pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source, target, and release properties from Java 8 to Java 21.
Add and configure maven-compiler-plugin to version 3.11.0 to support Java 21 compilation.
Add opencsv dependency for CSV processing.
Add commons-lang3 dependency for utility functions.
Add javalin dependency for web server functionality.
Add thymeleaf dependency for web template rendering.
Add slf4j-simple dependency for logging required by javalin.
Update artifactId and name to reflect the new project identity.
Add project.build.sourceEncoding property to ensure UTF-8 encoding.

.idea/compiler.xml.general_idea: Update IntelliJ IDEA compiler configuration to reflect the current Maven module structure by replacing the old 'opencsv' module with the project's actual modules.
.idea/compiler.xml.human_impl: Replaced <module name="opencsv" /> with <module name="dds-2025-tpa-metamapa" /> and <module name="demo-apache-cfx-webclient" />

.idea/misc.xml.general_idea: Update IntelliJ IDEA project configuration to target JDK 21 instead of JDK 24.
.idea/misc.xml.human_impl: Changed languageLevel and project-jdk-name from 'JDK_24'/'openjdk-24' to 'JDK_21'/'openjdk-21' in .idea/misc.xml

README.md.general_idea: Add project name, course code, and university affiliation to the README header.
README.md.human_impl: Added '## *MetaMapa*' and description text with course code 23-2034 and UTN FRBA.

README.md.general_idea: Replace plain text list of teachers and assistants with a structured Markdown table including GitHub usernames and emails.
README.md.human_impl: Converted '- Docente: ...' and '- Ayudantes: ...' lists into tables with columns for Name, GitHub, and Email.

README.md.general_idea: Refactor the student group table to remove the redundant 'Curso' column and add a 'Número de Orden' column.
README.md.human_impl: Removed 'Curso' column from group table and added 'Número de Orden' column with specific integer values.

README.md.general_idea: Add a code block with instructions on how to use Co-authored-by trailers in git commits.
README.md.human_impl: Added a bash code block showing 'git commit -m ... Co-authored-by: ...' syntax.
